name: theme-toggle
title: Theme Toggle
description: Dark/light toggle button. Wraps Button.astro + @astro-shad/theme-script's initThemeToggle() -- installing this one item is the whole consumer-side wiring, no manual script required beyond the one-time THEME_PREHIDE_JS head script (see @astro-shad/theme-script). Default label "Theme", override via the default slot. Extracted 2026-07-20 from BaseLayout.astro, which now consumes it directly.
